task: Create a REST API in Node.js with Express that manages a collection of books (CRUD). Each book has id, title, author, year, and genre. Store data in a JSON file on disk. Implement input validation with Joi or zod. Add proper error handling middleware. Include pagination (page/limit query params) on GET /books. Test with curl.
description: Build a RESTful books API with Express, file storage, and validation
expected_output: A working CRUD API with JSON file storage and validation

task: Build a real-time chat server using Node.js with raw WebSocket (no socket.io). Support multiple chat rooms. Each client can join/leave rooms. Messages broadcast to all clients in the room. Track connected users per room. Handle disconnections gracefully. Write a minimal HTML/JS client that connects and sends messages. Verify with two browser tabs.
description: Build a WebSocket chat server with rooms and chat client
expected_output: A WebSocket chat server with room support and test client

task: Create a rate-limiting middleware for Express that tracks requests per IP using an in-memory store. Support configurable windowMs and maxRequests. Return 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded. Use a sliding window approach (not fixed window). Handle cleanup of stale entries. Export as a factory function: rateLimit({windowMs, max}).
description: Build a sliding window rate limiter middleware
expected_output: A reusable sliding window rate limiter middleware

task: Build a URL shortener service with Node.js and Express. Accept a long URL via POST /shorten, return a short code. Redirect GET /:code to the original URL. Store mappings in SQLite using better-sqlite3. Track click count and last accessed timestamp. Add a GET /stats/:code endpoint for analytics. Validate URLs before shortening.
description: Build a URL shortener with SQLite and click tracking
expected_output: A URL shortener service with SQLite storage and analytics

task: Create a JWT authentication system in Node.js with Express. Implement: POST /register (hash password with bcrypt), POST /login (return JWT), middleware to protect routes, and a GET /me endpoint. Use environment variables for JWT secret. Include token expiry (15min access tokens). Handle edge cases: expired token, malformed token, missing token.
description: Build a JWT auth system with register, login, and protected routes

task: Build an image resizing microservice in Node.js using Sharp. Accept POST /resize with image URL and dimensions (width, height, fit mode). Download the image, resize it, and return the resized image. Cache resized images to disk. Support formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Add input validation for dimensions (max 4000px). Return proper content-type headers.
description: Build an image resizing microservice with Sharp
expected_output: A working image resizing service with disk cache

task: Create a task scheduler library in Node.js. Support: schedule(name, cronExpression, taskFn), cancel(name), list(). Use node-cron or implement cron parsing yourself. Tasks should run in a separate async context. Handle errors in tasks without crashing the scheduler. Log execution results (start, end, duration, error). Add a once option for one-time tasks.
description: Build a cron-based task scheduler library

task: Build a CSV-to-JSON converter as a CLI tool in Node.js. Accept input file path, optional output path (default stdout), and options for delimiter (default comma), with-header (default true), and pretty-print. Handle quoted fields containing commas and newlines. Stream large files instead of loading entirely. Write tests using Node's built-in assert.
description: Build a CLI CSV-to-JSON converter with streaming
expected_output: A CLI tool for CSV to JSON conversion

task: Create a simple in-memory caching library in Node.js. Support: get(key), set(key, value, ttlSeconds), del(key), clear(), has(key), and stats() returning hit/miss counts and memory usage. Implement LRU eviction when max entries exceeded. Use a Map internally. Add a wrap(key, ttl, fn) method that caches the result of an async function.
description: Build an LRU in-memory cache with async wrap support
expected_output: An LRU cache library with async wrap

task: Build a file upload service in Node.js with Express using multer. Support single and multiple file uploads. Restrict file types to images (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF) and max file size (5MB). Generate unique filenames. Store files on disk with date-based directory structure (YYYY/MM/DD). Add a GET /files/:filename endpoint. Validate before saving.
description: Build a file upload service with multer and validation
expected_output: A file upload service with type/size validation

task: Create a pagination middleware for Express that works with any route. The middleware should parse page and limit from query string. Inject a paginate(ModelOrQuery) method into req that returns {data, total, page, limit, totalPages}. Support cursor-based pagination as an option. Handle edge cases: page 0, negative values, non-numeric.
description: Build a reusable pagination middleware for Express
expected_output: A reusable pagination middleware supporting both page and cursor-based

task: Build a request logging middleware for Express that logs: method, url, status code, response time (ms), and user-agent. Use a custom logger with log levels (info, warn, error). Include a unique request ID (uuid) in every log line and response header (X-Request-Id). AsyncLocalStorage for request-scoped context. Write logs to both console and a file (rotating).
description: Build a structured request logger with async context
expected_output: A request logging middleware with AsyncLocalStorage context

task: Create a simple pub/sub event system in Node.js (EventEmitter pattern) with async support. Implement: subscribe(event, handler), publish(event, data), unsubscribe(event, handler), once(event, handler), and clear(event). Handlers should support async/await. Errors in one handler should not affect others. Add wildcard subscription ('*' for all events).
description: Build an async pub/sub event system
expected_output: An async pub/sub event emitter library

task: Build a server health check endpoint with Express. GET /health should return JSON with: status ('ok' or 'degraded'), uptime (seconds), memory usage (rss/heapUsed/heapTotal), database connectivity (try querying or report not configured), and version from package.json. Add a /health/detailed endpoint that takes longer but gives more info. Cache the health check for 5 seconds.
description: Build a comprehensive health check endpoint
expected_output: A health check endpoint with system metrics

task: Build a WebSocket-based collaborative text editing server (like a mini Google Docs). Each document is identified by an ID. Clients join a document room and send edit operations (insert/delete at position). Use Operational Transformation (OT) for conflict resolution. Broadcast changes to all other clients in the room. Handle client disconnect gracefully. Write a simple browser client.
description: Build a collaborative text editor with Operational Transformation
expected_output: A collaborative editing server with OT conflict resolution
